--- Round 2 ---
<think>The question asks for "夏厦精密的其他应付款" (other payables of Xiaxia Precision).

From the <info> block of DOC2_A7, I can see the consolidated balance sheet (合并资产负债表) with the following relevant line:

|其他应付款|913,610.87|743,805.85|

This shows:
- 期末余额 (ending balance): 913,610.87元
- 期初余额 (beginning balance): 743,805.85元

The question asks for "其他应付款是多少" (what is the other payables), which typically refers to the current/ending balance. The value is 913,610.87元.

I have found the exact evidence needed. I can now stop and provide the answer with the verbatim quote from the document.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the exact value of 其他应付款 in the consolidated balance sheet"}</search>
<answer>"|其他应付款|913,610.87|743,805.85|"</answer>
